name: Creative / Narrative World
description: Explores 'what-if' story outcomes by letting characters act inside a fictional world (e.g. an alternate ending). The world has no real-world diurnal cycle, so activity is roughly uniform and the horizon is measured in story-time.
prompt_framing: This is a creative narrative simulation. Agents are characters from a story with established personalities, relationships and motivations, acting out how events might unfold (for example an alternate or lost ending). Prioritise in-character voice, interpersonal dynamics and dramatic causality over realism. Interactions represent conversations, encounters and gatherings within the fictional world.
